overall.description: A cinematic third-person game engine scene depicting a character with white hair and a green hooded jacket standing inside a dimly lit, multi-level antique shop. The environment features warm amber lighting from hanging bulbs, wooden shelves filled with bottles and curiosities, and a merchant NPC attending to goods. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric, characteristic of a high-fidelity survival horror game.

scene_state.functional_zone: antique shop interior with multi-level wooden shelving and merchant counter

events.description: interaction prompt icon appears at bottom of screen indicating available action with merchant

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the merchant counter, occasionally shifting weight while observing the shop interior

notable_agents.action: merchant handling items behind the counter, consulting a book and gesturing with hands

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving unit filled with bottles and jars, extending from floor to ceiling
single exposed light bulb hanging from ceiling providing warm amber illumination
wooden railing of upper level overlooking the main shop floor
glass-fronted cabinet containing various items and curiosities
dark wooden merchant counter with items displayed on top
large metal birdcage hanging near the upper right area

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place entirely within a dimly lit, atmospheric antique shop with traditional wooden architecture. The camera maintains a steady third-person view behind a character in a green jacket as they stand observing the merchant, who is actively handling goods behind a wooden counter. Warm light from a hanging bulb illuminates shelves filled with bottles and curiosities, while an interaction prompt briefly appears indicating gameplay functionality.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective within a dimly lit antique shop, focusing on the quiet interaction between a customer and a merchant. It begins behind a character in a green jacket, who stands still while observing the merchant actively handling goods behind a heavy wooden counter. As the camera lingers, the warm glow from a hanging bulb emphasizes the textures of the traditional wooden architecture and the cluttered shelves filled with bottles and curiosities. The scene then subtly shifts focus toward the gameplay interface as an interaction prompt briefly appears, grounding the cinematic mood in a functional gaming environment.
